calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Thomas E. Shuck, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Banc of America Leaing & Capital, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, via CourtCall.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Golden State Legal Copy,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Delia Ford appeared via Courtcall.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $98,778.40
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $500.97
Total Judgment in the amount of $102,104.43
Judgment signed in open court.
